'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 8''' was published in May [[1978]] by [[Paradise Press]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"The Special Effects Wizards", by [[John May]]: a look at [[John Dykstra]] and the special effects of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|the original film]].
*"The Ins and Outs of Space Travel", by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: a discussion of real space travel, including the [[Wikipedia: Space shuttle program|Space Shuttle]] (which would not be launched for another three years), and the possibilities of space colonization and interstellar travel.
*"[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Ben Kenobi]]—Man or Legend?", by [[Brian Shepherd]]: a profile of the old [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], and his skills with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].
